howDoIGetMyLicense: How do I get my License?
eachProductLicenseIsAssignedBasedOnThe: Each product license is assigned based on the number of devices you choose. You will receive login credentials to access D-Secure Cloud and the necessary installation files after your order is confirmed. The total number of licenses will correspond to the number of devices selected during purchase. Once the order is confirmed, your product access details will be delivered instantly.
weOfferFreeShippingForAllPhysicalDeliver: We offer FREE shipping for all physical deliveries worldwide. For digital delivery, you receive instant access via email.
whatPaymentMethodsDoYouAccept: What payment methods do you accept?
weAcceptAllMajorCreditCardsVisaMastercar: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express), PayPal, bank transfers, and purchase orders for enterprise customers.
yesWeOfferDiscountsForBulkOrdersPlease: Yes! We offer discounts for bulk orders. Please submit a request via our Custom License form to receive a personalized quote with discounted pricing.
whatKindOfSupportDoYouProvide: What kind of support do you provide?
allLicensesIncludeLifetimeTechnicalSuppo: All licenses include lifetime technical support via email, phone, and live chat. Enterprise customers receive priority support with dedicated account managers.
weProvideContinuousSupportIncludingRegul: We provide continuous support including regular software updates, technical assistance, compliance monitoring, and renewal coordination. Think of us as your ongoing partner in data hygiene.
